creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I updated the port in following step: 

1. Change the version number in Makefile 

2. Regenerate the patch file. 

3. Adjust the PLIST file to correctly list all files. 

4. Also added @dirrm directives in the PLIST. 

If there is any problem, please let me know.
